name: Old New England Boiled Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Substitute rutabagas for turnips if desired.
2. Cut the meat into serving-sized pieces, cover with water and bring to a boil. Lower heat and simmer for approximately 3-1/2 hours. Remove the meat and keep warm.
3. Scrub the vegetables and cut into quarters or cubes. Cut the cabbage into 6 wedges.
4. Bring the broth to a boil; add carrots, turnips, onions and potatoes. Cook for 15 minutes.
5. Add cabbage and cook for 15-20 minutes longer.
6. Arrange meat on serving platter and place vegetables around the meat in an attractive pattern. Sprinkle all with fresh ground black pepper.
